settings.subtitle: Clean, structural, unmistakable. Your scent is salt and stone and clarified air — nothing wasted, every note essential.

settings.content: You do not over-explain. The good idea, the right cut, the clean line. You strip a thing down until only what matters is left.
Wet rock, cold metal, the high note of citrus over a cement floor. Fragrance with the discipline of an architect.

settings.label: Read more
settings.content: The Mineralist favours austere compositions — vetiver dry as flint, iris root, salt, ambergris, frankincense, the high mineral edge of certain citruses. Scents that read as material rather than mood. Less ornament, more truth.

settings.title: The | Mineralist's | companions
settings.subtitle: Notes that mirror your edge — quiet, exacting, essential.

settings.title: Share your scent archetype with your friends!
settings.body: Let your circle find their olfactory match — the discovery is more interesting when it's compared.
